---
title: "Events"
subtitle: "Upcoming and recurring events hosted by chen.ist"
description: "Find upcoming hackathons, workshops, conferences, meetups, and summer school programs hosted by chen.ist Academy."
from: markdown+raw_html
page-layout: full
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <style>
        .ap { --c: #F5A623; --g: #86868b; font-family: 'Open Sans', -apple-system, system-ui, sans-serif; }
        .ap-hero { padding: 12rem 0 8rem; text-align: center; }
        .ap-hero h1 { font-size: clamp(2.5rem, 5vw, 4.5rem); font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: -0.045em; line-height: 1.06; }
        .ap-hero .gr { color: var(--c); }
        .ap-hero p { font-size: 1.35rem; color: var(--g); max-width: 500px; margin: 1.5rem auto 0; line-height: 1.45; }
        .ap-s { padding: 7rem 0; }
        .ap-bg { padding: 7rem 0; background: #f5f5f7; }
        [data-bs-theme="dark"] .ap-bg { background: #161617; }
        .ap h2 { font-size: clamp(2rem, 4vw, 3rem); font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: -0.035em; text-align: center; line-height: 1.1; margin-bottom: 0.5rem; }
        .ap .sub { text-align: center; font-size: 1.1rem; color: var(--g); max-width: 480px; margin: 0 auto 5rem; }
        .ap-lk { color: var(--c); font-size: 1rem; text-decoration: none; }
        .ap-lk:hover { text-decoration: underline; }
        .ap-lk::after { content: " ›"; font-weight: 300; }
        .ap-b { display: inline-block; padding: 0.85rem 2.25rem; background: var(--c); color: #fff; border-radius: 980px; font-weight: 500; font-size: 1rem; text-decoration: none; transition: background 0.15s; }
        .ap-b:hover { background: #d9901e; color: #fff; text-decoration: none; }
        .ap-d { width: 36px; height: 3px; background: var(--c); margin: 0 auto 3.5rem; border-radius: 2px; opacity: 0.6; }
        .ap-cta { padding: 10rem 0; text-align: center; }
        .ap-cta h2 { font-size: clamp(2rem, 4vw, 3rem); margin-bottom: 1rem; }
        .ap-cta p { font-size: 1.1rem; color: var(--g); max-width: 420px; margin: 0 auto 2.5rem; line-height: 1.5; }

        /* Featured event — large hero card */
        .ev-feat { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 5rem; margin-bottom: 5rem; }
        .ev-feat-img { flex: 0 0 50%; }
        .ev-feat-img img { width: 100%; border-radius: 28px; }
        .ev-feat-txt .ev-tag { display: inline-block; background: var(--c); color: #fff; font-size: 0.7rem; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.06em; padding: 0.25rem 0.75rem; border-radius: 980px; margin-bottom: 1rem; }
        .ev-feat-txt h3 { font-size: clamp(1.75rem, 3vw, 2.5rem); font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: -0.03em; margin-bottom: 0.75rem; }
        .ev-feat-txt .ev-meta { font-size: 0.9rem; color: var(--c); font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 1rem; }
        .ev-feat-txt .ev-meta i { margin-right: 0.25rem; }
        .ev-feat-txt p { font-size: 1.05rem; color: var(--g); line-height: 1.6; margin-bottom: 1.5rem; }

        /* Event list — clean, no cards */
        .ev-item { padding: 2.5rem 0; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.06); display: flex; gap: 3rem; align-items: flex-start; }
        [data-bs-theme="dark"] .ev-item { border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.06); }
        .ev-item:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
        .ev-item-date { flex-shrink: 0; width: 80px; text-align: center; }
        .ev-item-date .month { font-size: 0.75rem; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.08em; color: var(--c); font-weight: 700; }
        .ev-item-date .day { font-size: 2.25rem; font-weight: 700; line-height: 1; margin-top: 0.1rem; }
        .ev-item-body h3 { font-size: 1.2rem; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 0.25rem; letter-spacing: -0.01em; }
        .ev-item-body .ev-loc { font-size: 0.85rem; color: var(--g); margin-bottom: 0.5rem; }
        .ev-item-body p { font-size: 0.92rem; color: var(--g); line-height: 1.5; margin-bottom: 0.75rem; }

        /* Recurring — clean tiles */
        .rec { text-align: center; padding: 0 1rem; }
        .rec i { font-size: 1.75rem; color: var(--c); display: block; margin-bottom: 0.75rem; opacity: 0.85; }
        .rec h3 { font-size: 1.05rem; font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 0.35rem; }
        .rec p { font-size: 0.88rem; color: var(--g); line-height: 1.5; }
        .rec-when { font-size: 0.8rem; color: var(--c); font-weight: 600; margin-top: 0.5rem; }

        /* Past — timeline style */
        .past-item { display: flex; gap: 2rem; align-items: flex-start; padding: 1.75rem 0; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.04); }
        [data-bs-theme="dark"] .past-item { border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.04); }
        .past-item:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
        .past-year { flex-shrink: 0; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.08em; color: var(--g); width: 80px; padding-top: 0.2rem; }
        .past-body h4 { font-size: 1.05rem; font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 0.2rem; }
        .past-body p { font-size: 0.88rem; color: var(--g); line-height: 1.5; margin-bottom: 0.5rem; }

        @media (max-width: 767px) {
          .ap-hero { padding: 7rem 0 5rem; }
          .ev-feat { flex-direction: column; gap: 2.5rem; }
          .ev-feat-img { flex: none; }
          .ev-item { flex-direction: column; gap: 0.5rem; }
          .ev-item-date { width: auto; text-align: left; display: flex; gap: 0.5rem; align-items: baseline; }
          .ev-item-date .day { font-size: 1.5rem; }
          .ap-cta { padding: 6rem 0; }
        }
        </style>
---

```{=html}
<div class="ap">

<div class="ap-hero">
  <div class="container">
    <h1>Academy <span class="gr">Events</span></h1>
    <p>Hackathons, workshops, and programs. Connect, learn, and build.</p>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- FEATURED EVENT -->
<div class="ap-s">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="ev-feat">
      <div class="ev-feat-img">
        <img src="/assets/images/stock/team-meeting.jpg" alt="AI Ethics Hackathon">
      </div>
      <div class="ev-feat-txt">
        <div class="ev-tag">Featured</div>
        <h3>AI Ethics Hackathon</h3>
        <div class="ev-meta">
          <i class="bi bi-calendar3"></i> March 5, 2026 &nbsp;&nbsp;
          <i class="bi bi-geo-alt"></i> Bucharest
        </div>
        <p>A weekend hackathon on ethical AI — bias detection, responsible design, and building AI systems that prioritize human values. Teams of 2-5, all skill levels welcome.</p>
        <a href="/academy/events/pages/ai-ethics-hackathon.html" class="ap-b" style="font-size:0.9rem; padding:0.7rem 1.75rem;">Register now</a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- UPCOMING EVENTS LIST -->
<div class="ap-bg">
  <div class="container" style="max-width: 800px;">
    <h2>Coming up</h2>
    <p class="sub">Spots are limited. Register early.</p>

    <div class="ev-item">
      <div class="ev-item-date">
        <div class="month">Aug</div>
        <div class="day">1</div>
      </div>
      <div class="ev-item-body">
        <h3>Summer School 2026</h3>
        <div class="ev-loc"><i class="bi bi-geo-alt me-1"></i> Craiova · 2 weeks</div>
        <p>Intensive program in cybersecurity, cloud, and AI. For students and professionals building technical careers.</p>
        <a href="/academy/events/pages/summer-school-2025.html" class="ap-lk">Details</a>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="ev-item">
      <div class="ev-item-date">
        <div class="month">Sep</div>
        <div class="day">15</div>
      </div>
      <div class="ev-item-body">
        <h3>Makers Workshop</h3>
        <div class="ev-loc"><i class="bi bi-geo-alt me-1"></i> Bucharest · 1 day</div>
        <p>Hands-on hardware workshop for makers, DIY experts, and hardware hackers.</p>
        <a href="/academy/events/pages/makers-workshop.html" class="ap-lk">Details</a>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="ev-item">
      <div class="ev-item-date">
        <div class="month">Oct</div>
        <div class="day">4</div>
      </div>
      <div class="ev-item-body">
        <h3>SpaceApps Challenge 2026</h3>
        <div class="ev-loc"><i class="bi bi-geo-alt me-1"></i> Craiova · 48 hours</div>
        <p>NASA's international hackathon — space exploration, satellite tech, and Earth observation solutions.</p>
        <a href="/academy/events/pages/space-hackathon.html" class="ap-lk">Details</a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- RECURRING -->
<div class="ap-s">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Every month</h2>
    <p class="sub">Regular meetups and talks you can count on.</p>
    <div class="row g-5">
      <div class="col-md-4">
        <div class="rec">
          <i class="bi bi-calendar-event"></i>
          <h3>Computer Club</h3>
          <p>Open discussion, hacking, and exploration of current tech trends.</p>
          <div class="rec-when">Last Thursday</div>
          <a href="https://clubul.computer/" class="ap-lk">Schedule</a>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-4">
        <div class="rec">
          <i class="bi bi-mic"></i>
          <h3>Tech Talks</h3>
          <p>Industry experts on emerging technologies and best practices.</p>
          <div class="rec-when">First Tuesday</div>
          <a href="https://lu.ma/chenistacademy" class="ap-lk">Next talk</a>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-4">
        <div class="rec">
          <i class="bi bi-code-slash"></i>
          <h3>Workshops</h3>
          <p>Coding sessions, open-source projects, and collaborative learning.</p>
          <div class="rec-when">See calendar</div>
          <a href="https://lu.ma/chenistacademy" class="ap-lk">Join</a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- PAST EVENTS -->
<div class="ap-bg">
  <div class="container" style="max-width: 700px;">
    <h2>Past highlights</h2>
    <p class="sub"></p>

    <div class="past-item">
      <div class="past-year">2024</div>
      <div class="past-body">
        <h4>Cyber Hygiene for Kids</h4>
        <p>Conference on screen time, social media safety, and digital boundaries. Craiova, with Rotary Club Probitas.</p>
        <a href="https://marca-ro.ca/2024/11/23/conferinta-igiena-digitala-la-copii-are-loc-la-craiova/" class="ap-lk" target="_blank">Read more</a>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="past-item">
      <div class="past-year">2023</div>
      <div class="past-body">
        <h4>Capture the Flag Hackathon</h4>
        <p>Web exploitation, cryptography, reverse engineering, digital forensics. Invitation-only, Craiova.</p>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="past-item">
      <div class="past-year">2016–2024</div>
      <div class="past-body">
        <h4>SpaceApps Challenge — 9 Editions</h4>
        <p>NASA's hackathon across Sweden and Romania. Linköping, Gothenburg, and Craiova.</p>
        <a href="https://alinmechenici.substack.com/p/sac" class="ap-lk" target="_blank">Read the story</a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- CTA -->
<div class="ap-cta">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="ap-d"></div>
    <h2>Don't miss the next one</h2>
    <p>Get event updates or discuss hosting a private event for your team.</p>
    <div style="display:flex; gap:1rem; justify-content:center; flex-wrap:wrap;">
      <a href="https://alinmechenici.substack.com" target="_blank" class="ap-b">Subscribe to updates</a>
      <a href="https://cal.com/chenist" target="_blank" class="ap-lk" style="padding-top:0.85rem;">Book a call</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

</div>
```
